summary.lv: Pieredzējis Linux sistēmu administrators Dativa komandā, instalējot un uzturot virtuālos Linux serverus, izstrādājot Ansible playbooks un konfigurējot Zabbix monitoringu.
summary.en: Experienced Linux systems administrator at Dativa, installing and maintaining virtual Linux servers, developing Ansible playbooks and configuring Zabbix monitoring. Requires 3+ years of experience.
